productDisplayName: FILA Men FILA Ace White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Ace shoe comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy.UpperMeshed upper with strategically placed overlays for enhanced breathable comfort and shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticPull loop for ease on/off and to hang the shoes from a backpackMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movementFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
